hero.title:
Coexisting with
the Ocean
hero.subtitle: Healthy Ocean, Happy Fishers
hero.description: Ocean Tech protects marine ecosystems with eco-friendly zinc fishing weights. We signed the first unit price contract with the National Federation of Fisheries Cooperatives using patented technology replacing lead weights.

items.title: Eco-Friendly Material
items.description: Zero marine heavy metal pollution with lead-free zinc alloy. 235 SVHC substances not detected.

items.title: 10-Year Durability
items.description: Zinc's natural corrosion-resistant properties provide 10x longer lifespan than traditional lead weights.

items.title: Increased Fisher Income
items.description: 80% cost reduction on replacements, completed 31-month fisherman pilot program.

items.title: Patented Technology
items.description: 6 patents and 4 design patents. Winner of 17th Korea Excellence Patent Award.

Let's Build the Future

cta.description: National Federation of Fisheries Cooperatives contracted product. Switch from lead to zinc weights for a healthier ocean.
